description: Known catalog errors identified during concordance construction (Appendix A of the paper). Each error records an erroneous Taisho-to-Tohoku link that appears in one or more sources due to catalog error propagation. The originating_source identifies where the error originated; downstream sources that copied it are flagged automatically during concordance building.
